claims.claimText: Fellows train in biomechanical engineering at UCLA Samueli, austere/polar training, Mars analog missions in Utah, NASA Human Research Program.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship curriculum / training components — Tier 2 trainee track.

claims.quote: “With deep space travel on the not-so-distant horizon, UCLA’s space medicine program is timely.
